basic.description:
{Basic Estates}

With Basic Estates, a hero contributes 250 gold per day to your team economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates by 1 for your player and allied players.

advanced.description:
{Advanced Estates}

With Advanced Estates, a hero contributes 500 gold per day to your team economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates by 2 for your player and allied players.

expert.description:
{Expert Estates}

With Expert Estates, a hero contributes 1000 gold per day to your team economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates by 3 for your player and allied players.
